soul_rip.name: Soul Rip
soul_rip.description: Setup/Builder: Rip a fragment of the soul from the target. Generates 15 Stamina and 1 Essence Pip.

essence_drain.name: Essence Drain
essence_drain.description: Setup: Drain vital energy over time. Generates 1 Essence Pip and applies [Weakened].

soul_reap.name: Soul Reap
soul_reap.description: Payoff: Reclaim the fragments stolen. Consumes all Essence Pips to deal damage and heal self for 10% per pip.

essence_burst.name: Essence Burst
essence_burst.description: Payoff/AOE: Release stored soul energy in a violent explosion. Consumes 3 Essence Pips to deal AOE damage.

spectral_armor.name: Spectral Armor
spectral_armor.description: Defense: Surround yourself with soul fragments. Reduces incoming damage by 40% for 6 ticks.

ethereal_form.name: Ethereal Form
ethereal_form.description: Defense: Briefly phase out of reality. Grants [Untargetable] for 2 ticks.

soul_dash.name: Soul Dash
soul_dash.description: Mobility: Rush through your targets as a ghost, moving to any connected room.

spiritual_feast.name: Spiritual Feast
spiritual_feast.description: Utility: Consume a soul fragment to restore 50 Stamina and 20 Concentration.

soul_reaver_physiology.name: Soul Reaver Physiology
soul_reaver_physiology.description: Passive: Life Eater. You gain 5% bonus damage for every Essence Pip held.
